Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Redesign sectors: retire Deep Tech, add Space + Hardware; strengthen enrichment

Sector taxonomy (lib/enrichment.ts, SectorBarChart, PortfolioGrid):
- Remove "Deep Tech" as a sector — it was too broad and described the
  entire fund thesis rather than differentiating individual companies
- Add "Space" (satellites, aerospace, drones, defence, launch) #818CF8
- Add "Hardware" (semiconductors, quantum, robotics, IoT, chips) #FBBF24
- Keep Technology, Healthcare, Climate, Finance, Consumer unchanged
- Legacy alias: "Deep Tech" still renders in amber (same as Hardware)
  for existing DB rows until they are re-enriched

Portfolio reclassifications:
- Swisspod, Ethereal X, Manas TU Space: Deep Tech → Space
- Keyron, Arch0: Technology → Hardware

Enrichment improvements (lib/enrichment.ts):
- Rewritten sector descriptions with more specific examples per category
- Explicit "ALWAYS search before answering, do not guess from training data"
- Stronger geography rules: "NEVER return Global — every company has a HQ"
- temperature 0→0.1 (allows model to decide to use search tool)
- maxTokens 150→200 (room for grounded reasoning before the JSON)
- parseResult() now accepts only the 7 valid sector names; remaps
  "Deep Tech" → "Hardware" automatically
- Better JSON extraction regex that matches both key orderings

Enrichment filter (app/api/enrich/route.ts):
- Add "sector.eq.Deep Tech" to NEEDS_ENRICHMENT_FILTER so existing
  deals classified as Deep Tech are re-enriched into Space or Hardware

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add jsPDF text-based PDF fallback for intake wizard

html2canvas rendering fails on mobile/low-memory browsers (21 pages
exceeds GPU canvas limits). Now tries html2canvas with 30s timeout,
falls back to pure jsPDF text PDF using structured form data.
Guarantees pdfUrl is always populated in webhook payload.

commit.message:
refactor(git-repo-agent): compile skill prompts at runtime instead of build step (#891)

Move compilation logic from compile_prompts.py into an importable
compiler.py module. Agent _load_prompt() functions now call
get_compiled_prompt() at import time with lru_cache, eliminating
the generated/ directory and its 6 committed files that could
silently go stale.

- New: prompts/compiler.py with get_compiled_prompt() (cached)
- Updated: 6 agent definitions to use runtime compilation
- Refactored: compile_prompts.py as thin CLI wrapper for debugging
- Deleted: generated/ directory (~7.3k lines of committed artifacts)

commit.message:
Add v2.8 installer — merged findings from two code reviews

Security:
- BAUD/PORT injection guard in bridge and session handler
- systemd service sandboxing (NoNewPrivileges, ProtectSystem, etc.)
- UFW reset flipped to opt-in (safe-by-default)

Bug fixes:
- rmconsole awk uses exact SYMLINK+="name" match (prevents substring collision)
- Session handler trap cleans up owner file on exit
- Tailscale repo detection supports Debian and Ubuntu
- ss port check uses strict sport= filter (prevents partial match)
- generate_mapping() checks port conflicts at bootstrap
- rmconsole map.tsv uses awk exact field match instead of grep -v
- Uninstall script removes itself

Cleanup:
- Removed unused net-tools dependency

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: guard storage migration against missing storage schema during supabase start

During `supabase start` the DB migrations run before the storage service
initialises, so storage.buckets does not exist. Wrapping in a conditional
DO block lets the migration skip silently on first boot and execute fully
on `supabase db reset` and on hosted Supabase.

commit.message:
fix : seek_rel — ajouter suffix 's' et signe littéral

VLC HTTP API exige le suffix 's' pour les seeks relatifs (val=+3.000s).
Sans ce suffix, VLC ignore silencieusement la commande.
Remplace aussi '%2B' par '+' littéral pour éviter tout problème d'encodage.

feat: Resources配下のGlobal Variablesをバイナリツリーから個別表示

- parseProjectTree(): .proバイナリツリーからPOUs/Global Variables等のノード構造を解析
- extractResourceContent(): バイナリツリーの子ノード名でデコード済みテキストを検索し、

commit.message:
Add smart notification prompt, per-event notify toggle, and localStorage gating

- NotificationPrompt only shows once on first /dashboard visit, respects 30-day
  cooldown after dismissal, and re-triggers when creating events with alerts
- Per-event notify toggle (bell icon) on event cards — on by default, users can
  turn off notifications for individual events
- Notify toggle button in event creation form (visible when alerts are set)
- Added notify boolean column to calendar_event table
- Cron skips events with notify=false
- Dashboard landing page shows prompt for first-time users

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

#588 Fix: use tenant-prefixed session_id for DB user creation in /api/init

The session_id in DB uses tenant prefix (e.g. casapantone:session_xxx) but
/api/init was passing the raw session_id without prefix. This caused the user
to be created with the correct name but under a different session_id than what
the conversations panel queries.

commit.message:
Add status text during data submission (#672)

* Add status text during data submission

When the donate button is clicked and spinning, the text above the button
changes from the donation question to "Submitting data... Please keep this
window open." This informs users that the submission is in progress and
they should not close the browser.

Includes translations for all supported languages (en, de, it, es, nl, ro, lt).

commit.message:
Fix confirmed factual errors and add missing context (verified against sources)

Factual errors fixed:
- Tenant settings: 2 are always required, 4 are conditional (Data Agent only)
  Previously stated 'enable all six' which is incorrect per official docs
- Pitfall 1 rewritten to reflect required vs conditional distinction
- Pitfall 8 (versioning): flags contradiction between IQ overview ('you can version')
  and FAQ ('versioning isn't currently available'); FAQ is operational reality

Added missing context:
- Alternatives section: vendor lock-in warning with analyst quotes (Kramer/Moor Insights),
  competitive context (Databricks Metric Views GA, Snowflake Semantic Views GA, both w/ git versioning)
- dbt MetricFlow row: reframed as philosophical portability difference, not team preference
- Billing disclaimer: IQ billing meters not yet published, metered billing planned H1 2026
- Business UX gap callout: ontology editor requires data engineering skills despite marketing
- Cold start note in Pattern 2: Michael Ni quote, explicit budget warning
- 2 new references (InfoWorld, Typedef) — total: 19

commit.message:
Add CommissionTier enum to Prisma schema

The CommissionTier enum (STARTER, GROWTH, SENIOR, ELITE) was missing from
the schema but imported by sub-broker DTOs and services, causing runtime
TypeError on startup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remove special forces gun + fix arm direction consistency

- Remove 특수소총 (weapon idx 1) and change 특수부대 class to use AK-47
- Fix arm direction: use camera-space coordinates with automatic
  inverse-quaternion transform per weapon wrapper rotation
- Arms now look identical across all weapons regardless of model orientation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement Phase 4: Location inventory, external events, and supply chains

Locations now have property bags (food_supply, ore_supply, tool_supply) with
decay rates. Production actions deposit goods at work locations, trade/consumption
actions draw from location supply (gated by locationPropertyMin requirements).
Ship arrival events inject supplies at the harbor on recurring intervals.

Engine changes:
- LocationStateStore: mutable runtime state for location properties
- ActionExecutor: "location:current" targeting + scaleByLocationProperty
- UtilityScorer: locationPropertyMin/Below requirement checks
- PropertyTicker: TickLocations for supply decay
- ExternalEvent model + SimulationRunner event processing
- DataLoader: loads events.json, snapshots include location properties

Data: 15 locations with supply properties, 5 ship arrival events, 16 updated
actions for location inventory, 1 new work_metal action at Craftsman Row,
68 total actions. Balance: MOSTLY BALANCED, 9 warnings, 0 failures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add cross-workflow image channel system with ImageReceiver node

Named channels allow PreviewToLoad to send images to a shared channel
(stored in channels.json) that ImageReceiver nodes can read from,
enabling cross-workflow image passing without brittle node IDs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: render chat messages in real execution order

Previously, assistant messages always displayed in a fixed order:
thinking → text → tool calls. Now they follow the actual execution
sequence (e.g., thinking → tool → text → tool → more text).

- Add ContentBlock type to preserve ordered sequence of thinking,
  text, and tool_use events as they stream in
- Update handleServerMessage to maintain contentBlocks alongside
  existing fields for backward compatibility
- Rewrite convertStoredMessages to build contentBlocks from stored
  SDK ContentBlock arrays, preserving original order
- Refactor MessageBubble with OrderedContentBlocks renderer and
  LegacyAssistantContent fallback for old messages
- Fix duplicate React key bug in history message IDs

Fix SQL editor: execute statements individually so CREATE TABLE persists

Replace executescript splitting with per-statement execute + commit,
so DDL and DML all run in the same connection and results from the
last SELECT are captured correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

canvas: informative redesign — color language, timeline, plane rings

Color by type: green=system · cyan=content · amber=crystallizing.

Timeline arc for drops: most recent at 12 o'clock, older spread clockwise
270° — upper-right gap is the future zone. Crystallizing drops drift
18% outward toward innerstellar.csmcl.space ring.

Three-planes rings: faint arcs beyond drop ring (claude.innerstellar /
innerstellar.csmcl.space / csmcl.space). Labels in future gap.
Now marker pulses amber at 12 o'clock.

Hover labels: 3 lines (title · role · description) + idea count on drops.
Focus panel: color-coded border, description, session pointer for system folds.
State strip: N drops · N folds · N crystallizing · date.

space.js: type + description + pointer on all entities. New: three-planes
fold, priment-role drop (crystallizing), content-context drop + 4 ideas.
Theurgist role → 'traveler flux'.

hash unchanged.

Gap investigation (#17): fix panic in clause_structure::find_modal() where
MatchSpan positions from full text were applied to extracted clause substring
(5 laws unblocked). Fix enrichment skip check from duty_holder to duty_type —
108 laws with Responsibilities/Powers but no Duties were miscounted as
unenriched. True gap is 33 non-regulatory laws + 47 missing LRT records.
